name: Fudge Yummies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9" pan. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt 1/2 cup butter and 1 oz. chocolate. Add the remaining bar ingredients, mix well. Spread into the prepared pan. In a small bowl, combine 6 oz cream cheese with the next 5 filling ingredients. Blend until smooth and fluffy. Stir in nuts. Spread over chocolate mixture. Sprinkle with chocolate chips. Bake for 25-35 minutes. Sprinkle with marshmallows and bake for an additional 2 minutes longer. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt 1/4 cup butter, 1 oz. chocolate, the remaining 2 oz cream cheese, and milk. Stir in powdered sugar until smooth. Immediately pour over marshmallows and swirl together.
Reserve 2 oz cream cheese for frosting.
Note: Cream cheese can be used in both the filling and frosting.
